content: 1. Photo gallery on device contains 42 images labeled 'Sohna Road Sunset Shoot - 17.03.2024.' Geotags show locations in Sohna Road between 18:00–19:30. However, metadata timestamps were altered. Original EXIF timestamps show the earliest image was taken on March 10, 2024, at 17:45. 2. Bluetooth logs show pairing with device 'Vikas_Mehta_iPhone' at 18:50:12 and 18:52:47. Location data from Bluetooth pairing corresponds to Sector 45, within 300m of pedestrian crossing. 3. Device location history (GPS) shows movement from home (Sector 44) to Sector 45 between 18:40–19:00, then return home at 19:05. 4. WhatsApp messages with Vikas Mehta were deleted between 18:56 and 19:00. Recovered fragments indicate: 'He’s gone. Clean the car. I’m on the bus.' 5. Conclusion: The photo gallery was fabricated to establish alibi. Device was physically present at the crime scene at time of impact.
